response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering credentials and over a decade of polyglot experience, but the role demands 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows plus SQL Server/Oracle and fixed-income or investment-banking domain expertise. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014–2015) and no capital-markets, fixed-income, or banking experience. Primary stacks are Node.js/TypeScript and DLang on Linux, which do not satisfy the mandatory requirements.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with 10+ years across web, embedded, and backend systems
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing
Prior low-latency, high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Only ~6 months of C/C++ experience (NI, 2014–2015), far below the 5–10 years required
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment-banking domain exposure
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows-platform development background

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
